description: Composition:Beige round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitIf you strongly believe in what John Lennon advocated through his chartbuster "Imagine" that we are one country, one world, one people, then here's the perfect t-shirt for you. Turn this thought into reality with this tantra tee advertising your goal.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
